seo.title: Event Equipment Rentals — LED Walls, Sound, DJ, Lighting | BEATROX
seo.description: Professional event equipment rentals in Portland, OR — LED video walls, sound systems, DJ equipment, lighting, lasers, backline, and more. Delivery and on-site support available.

og.title: Event Equipment Rentals — BEATROX Portland
og.description: Professional LED walls, sound, DJ, lighting, and backline rentals for events, concerts, and productions. Get a quote today.

hero.headline: Professional Equipment Rentals
hero.subheadline: Industry-grade LED walls, sound systems, DJ equipment, lighting, lasers, and backline — delivered, set up, and supported by the Beatrox team.

categories.name: LED Video Walls
categories.description: High-resolution LED panels for any footprint — indoor, outdoor, and custom configurations.

items.name: Indoor Fine-Pitch LED Panels
specs: 1.5mm – 3.9mm pixel pitch
ROE, Absen, and Unilumin panel options
Scalable from 10x6ft to 100ft+ wide configurations
Media server integration and pixel mapping included
items.description: Crystal-clear LED panels for conferences, brand activations, and stage backdrops where viewers are close to the screen. Full content formatting and on-site LED technician support included.

items.name: Outdoor High-Brightness LED Panels
specs: 6mm – 10mm pixel pitch
High-brightness panels rated for direct sunlight
Touring-grade road cases and rigging hardware
Weather-resistant construction for outdoor events
items.description: Rugged, high-brightness LED panels designed for outdoor festivals, sporting events, and large-scale activations. Built to perform in daylight and withstand the elements.

items.name: Curved & Creative LED Builds
specs: Custom curved, corner, and non-standard configurations
Infinity mirror and architectural surface integration
Seamless wall-to-wall multi-panel builds
Custom content design and pre-visualization available
items.description: Break the rectangle with custom LED configurations — curved walls, infinity mirror setups, and architectural integrations that transform spaces into immersive visual environments.

items.name: LED Media Server Packages
specs: Resolume, Disguise, or TouchDesigner playback options
Custom content design and pixel mapping
Live VJ and media server operation available
Multi-screen sync and show control integration
items.description: Complete media server and playback solutions for LED walls, including custom content creation, pixel mapping, and live VJ operation. Turnkey packages with hardware, software, and operator.

categories.name: Sound Equipment
categories.description: Professional PA systems, mixing consoles, wireless systems, and monitoring for events of any size.

items.name: Line Array PA Systems
specs: L-Acoustics, d&b audiotechnik, and Meyer Sound systems
Scalable from 100-person rooms to 5,000+ capacity venues
Touring-grade subwoofer and fill speaker options
System tuning and front-of-house engineering available
items.description: Concert-grade line array PA systems configured to your venue and audience size. Full system tuning, rigging, and front-of-house audio engineering support included.

items.name: Digital Mixing Consoles
specs: DiGiCo, Yamaha, and Midas digital consoles
32 to 96 channel configurations
Stage boxes and digital snake systems
Multi-track recording and playback integration
items.description: Industry-standard digital mixing consoles with experienced operators. From intimate events to large concert productions, our consoles deliver pristine audio quality and flexible routing.

items.name: Wireless Microphone Systems
specs: Shure, Sennheiser, and Lectrosonics wireless systems
Handheld, lavalier, and headset microphone options
Frequency coordination and RF scanning
Up to 24 simultaneous wireless channels available
items.description: Professional wireless microphone systems for speeches, performances, and broadcasts. Full frequency coordination and RF management to ensure clean, interference-free audio.

items.name: Stage Monitor Systems
specs: Wedge and side-fill monitor configurations
In-ear monitor (IEM) systems available
Shure PSM and Sennheiser IEM options
Monitor engineering (A2) support available
items.description: Complete stage monitoring solutions including floor wedges, side-fills, and in-ear monitor systems. Optional monitor engineering (A2) support ensures every performer hears exactly what they need.

categories.name: DJ Equipment
categories.description: Industry-standard DJ equipment for world-class performances — delivered, set up, and supported.

items.name: Pioneer CDJ/DJM Packages
specs: Pioneer DJ CDJ-3000 & CDJ-2000NXS2 media players
Pioneer DJM-900NXS2 & DJM-A9 mixers
Allen & Heath Xone mixer options
Road-case and touring-ready configurations
items.description: The industry standard for club and festival DJs. Pioneer CDJ and DJM packages configured to artist specs, delivered with full cabling, cases, and on-site technical support.

items.name: Technics Turntable Setups
specs: Technics SL-1200MK7 and SL-1200M3D turntables
Matched with Pioneer or Allen & Heath mixers
Ortofon and Shure cartridge options
Full phono preamp and grounding solutions
items.description: Vinyl-focused DJ setups featuring Technics SL-1200 turntables, premium cartridges, and matched mixers. Perfect for turntablists, vinyl collectors, and events requiring analog warmth.

items.name: DJ Booth & Fabrication
specs: Custom DJ booth fabrication and design
LED-integrated and branded facade options
Monitor speaker and club-style sound integration
Cable management and clean power distribution
items.description: Custom DJ booth fabrication with integrated lighting, branded facades, and clean cable management. Designed to complement your event aesthetic while keeping the DJ comfortable and in control.

categories.name: Backline & Stage
categories.description: Professional-grade backline and stage packages so your artists hit the stage ready to perform.

items.name: Drum Kit Packages
specs: Pearl, DW, and Ludwig drum kit configurations
Complete cymbal, hardware, and throne packages
Electronic drum options (Roland V-Drums)
Drum mic packages (Audio-Technica, Shure)
items.description: Touring-quality drum kits configured to artist riders. From jazz combos to heavy rock, our drum packages include shells, cymbals, hardware, and mics — fully tuned and ready to play.

items.name: Guitar & Bass Amp Packages
specs: Marshall, Fender, and Mesa/Boogie guitar amplifiers
Ampeg and Darkglass bass amplification
Cabinet options: 1x12, 2x12, 4x12, and 8x10
Pedalboard power and direct box (DI) included
items.description: Iconic guitar and bass amplifier packages for any genre. From clean Fender tones to high-gain Marshall stacks and punchy Ampeg bass rigs, delivered with cabinets, DIs, and pedalboard power.

items.name: Keyboard & Synth Packages
specs: Nord Stage, Roland RD, and Korg keyboard systems
Analog synthesizer options (Moog, Sequential, Korg)
Keyboard stands, benches, and sustain pedals
Direct boxes and stereo monitoring integration
items.description: Professional keyboard and synthesizer packages for stage and studio. From piano-focused Nord Stage systems to analog synth rigs, complete with stands, monitoring, and DI integration.

categories.name: Lighting Systems
categories.description: Complete lighting packages from design to operation — DMX rigs, LED washes, moving heads, and truss.

items.name: DMX Moving Head Packages
specs: Beam, spot, and wash moving head fixtures
Martin, Chauvet, and Robe fixture options
DMX programming and scene creation
Audio-reactive and timecode-triggered operation
items.description: Dynamic moving head packages programmed to your music and show. From tight beams to sweeping washes, our DMX moving head rigs add motion and drama to any stage or event.

items.name: LED Wash & PAR Packages
specs: Full-color RGBAW LED wash and PAR fixtures
Battery-powered wireless uplighting options
Addressable LED strip and pixel mapping systems
Environmental and architectural wash applications
items.description: Vibrant LED wash and PAR packages for stage lighting, uplighting, and environmental illumination. Battery-powered wireless options available for venues without easy power access.

items.name: Truss & Rigging
specs: Box truss, triangle truss, and ground support systems
Motorized chain hoist and rigging hardware
Custom truss configurations and custom builds
Certified rigging and structural safety compliance
items.description: Complete truss and rigging solutions for hanging lighting, LED walls, and effects. Custom configurations, certified rigging, and structural safety compliance for venues of all sizes.

categories.name: Laser Systems
categories.description: High-power professional laser systems for indoor and outdoor events — fully programmed and operated.

items.name: Indoor RGB Laser Systems
specs: 5W to 30W RGB laser projectors
ILDA and DMX-controlled beam and graphics projection
Haze and fog machine integration for visible beams
FDA variance and laser safety officer (LSO) included
items.description: Stunning indoor RGB laser systems for concerts, nightclubs, and brand activations. Programmed beam shows, graphic projections, and atmospheric effects with full safety compliance and on-site LSO.

items.name: Outdoor Sky-Scan Lasers
specs: High-power sky-scan lasers (30W to 80W+)
Long-range atmospheric beam projection
FAA coordination and outdoor safety compliance
Weather-resistant enclosures and remote operation
items.description: Massive sky-scan laser systems for outdoor festivals, arena shows, and large-scale events. Long-range beam projection visible for miles, with full FAA coordination and outdoor safety compliance.

cta.heading: Need something custom?
cta.subheading: We configure rental packages to your exact specs. Get a free quote in 24 hours.
